description: Fast analytic voxel overlap labeler for Task 25 active-learning acquisition, calibrated against mesh booleans.
method: Evaluate analytic clevis part occupancy at grid-cell centers inside each pair's AABB intersection and count overlapping cells.
notes: Initial calibration run analytic_calibration_v1_n12 found pitch=0.5 mm to be the best speed/accuracy tradeoff.
Mesh-backed signed-distance labeling was too slow for active learning on this machine, taking roughly 10-25 seconds per sample depending on setting.
The nonzero normalized threshold intentionally ignores tiny boolean slivers around ~2 mm^3 that center-sampled voxels can miss and that are not useful repair targets.
